name: Baked Bean Creole
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked beans of your choice
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. Add onions and garlic; sauté until softened.
2. Add diced bell peppers and sliced celery to the skillet. Cook for several minutes until vegetables are tender.
3. Stir in flour, then add tomatoes, tomato paste, basil, and rosemary.
4. Mix in cooked beans and breadcrumbs. If the mixture is too dry, add a little water.
5. Spoon the filling into an oiled casserole dish and sprinkle breadcrumbs on top.
6. Bake at 350°F for 30 minutes.
7. Serve with rice and salsa sauce.
